description: Composition Black tracksuit made of 100% polyester Black track jacket that has mock collar, full front zipper closure, ribbed hem and cuffs, long sleeves, blue panel on the sides, adidas patented 3-Stripes from the shoulders till the cuffs, two zippered pockets on the sides and embroidered brand name and logo on the left chest Black track pant that has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring on the inside, adidas patented 3-Stripe panels on the sides, blue panels on the sides, zipper at the hem, two side pockets, mesh lining and embroidered brand name and logo on the left thigh Fit Regular Wash care Normal wash cold inside out at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Dry in shade Cool iron do not iron on decoration Made of polyester fabric, this Adidas tracksuit is ideal for all your training needs. The sleek blue track jacket complements the track pants and the patented 3-Stripes gives it an added edge. The soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, while the drawstrings allow you to further customize the fit. Pair it with Sports t-shirts and performance shoes for an extended training session. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6', shoulders19", waist 32" and hips 38& rdquo
